3313130.name: The Cloud VR
3313130.description:
"This way. I'm waiting for you."

The Cloud VR is a healing fantasy VR game where you go on an adventure to meet someone waiting for you.

Exploring the Fantastic Space

You can explore various fantastic spaces. You can feed birds, touch fluffy clouds like cotton candy, or take an unknown elevator and move to another space.

Encountering a mysterious child

You may encounter a child on your journey. You can play with the child, playing the piano, drawing, and so on. At the end of the journey, you may come to realize who the child is.

You can enjoy this game using VR devices.

I hope you enjoy a moving journey in a fairytale-like world.
3313130.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
